summary: Comprehensive testing of Inter-Treasury Transfer feature completed. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified complete 2-step transfer flow: form validation, math captcha security verification, and successful balance updates.

issues: One test account shows negative balance (-$1,000) which may indicate a data issue from previous testing

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/treasury - List all treasury accounts (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/treasury - Create new treasury accounts (200 OK)
Backend: Transfer requires different source and destination accounts (400 error)
Backend: Transfer requires positive amount (400 error for zero/negative)
Backend: Transfer validates source account exists (404 error)
Backend: Transfer validates destination account exists (404 error)
Backend: Transfer checks insufficient balance (400 error)
Backend: Transfer returns proper response structure with transfer_id, accounts, amounts
Backend: Transfer with custom exchange rate applies correctly
Backend: Transfer recorded in account history (transfer_out/transfer_in)
Backend: Transfer requires authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Transfer button visible when 2+ treasury accounts exist
Frontend: Transfer dialog opens with From/To Account dropdowns, Amount input, Notes textarea
Frontend: Account dropdowns show account name, balance, and currency
Frontend: Available balance displayed below source account selector
Frontend: Transfer Preview shows Deduct (red) and Credit (green) amounts
Frontend: Continue button advances to Security Verification step
Frontend: Math Captcha shows random addition problem (e.g., 5 + 7 = ?)
Frontend: Transfer Summary displays From, To, Amount, Credit details
Frontend: Back button returns to form step
Frontend: Confirm Transfer executes transfer when correct captcha entered
Frontend: Success toast shows 'Transferred X USD to [Account Name]'
Frontend: Account balances update immediately after transfer
Frontend: View History button opens Transaction History dialog
Frontend: History dialog shows Date, Type, Reference, Amount columns
Frontend: History dialog has Start/End Date filters and Type filter
Frontend: Download Statement button available
Frontend: Transfer entries appear in history as transfer_out/transfer_in
seed_data_creation: Test treasury accounts created during backend testing (TEST_Source_Account_*, TEST_Dest_Account_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inter-Treasury Transfer feature fully tested and working. Key features: 1) POST /api/treasury/transfer endpoint validates source/dest accounts, balance, positive amount. 2) Frontend dialog has 2-step process - form entry with live preview, then math captcha security verification. 3) Transfers recorded in treasury_transactions collection as transfer_out (negative amount) and transfer_in (positive amount). 4) Exchange rate support for cross-currency transfers. 5) View History dialog shows all transaction types with filters and CSV download.

inter_treasury_transfer.dialog_opens: Working - Opens from Transfer button when 2+ accounts exist
inter_treasury_transfer.source_account_selector: Working - Shows accounts with balance and currency, displays available balance
inter_treasury_transfer.destination_account_selector: Working - Filters out source account, shows all active accounts
inter_treasury_transfer.amount_input: Working - With currency indicator from source account
inter_treasury_transfer.exchange_rate_field: Working - Appears when source/dest have different currencies
inter_treasury_transfer.transfer_preview: Working - Shows Deduct in red, Credit in green with calculated amounts
inter_treasury_transfer.notes_field: Working - Optional textarea for internal notes
inter_treasury_transfer.math_captcha: Working - Random addition problem, regenerates on wrong answer
inter_treasury_transfer.transfer_summary: Working - Shows From, To, Amount, Credit before confirmation
inter_treasury_transfer.balance_updates: Working - Both accounts update immediately after transfer
inter_treasury_transfer.history_recording: Working - Transfers appear as transfer_out and transfer_in in history

view_history.dialog_opens: Working - Opens from View History button on account cards
view_history.account_info: Working - Shows account name, bank, and current balance
view_history.date_filters: Working - Start Date and End Date date pickers
view_history.type_filter: Working - All Types, Deposit, Withdrawal, Settlement_in dropdown
view_history.transaction_table: Working - Date, Type, Reference, Amount columns with color coding
view_history.download_statement: Working - Button present to download CSV statement

backend_api.response: {transfer_id, source_account, destination_account, source_amount, destination_amount, exchange_rate, notes, created_at, created_by_name}
backend_api.validation: Validates different accounts, positive amount, sufficient balance, account existence

mocked_apis.exchange_rates: Currency exchange rates are hardcoded in backend/server.py EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD
